creator: bhs_bsd@precisionforesight.com
text:
As mentioned in bug report 209963, I've found a simpler workaround to successfully build net/kea and other ports that rely on lang/gcc (gcc version 4.8.5_2).

Manually build and install lang/gcc with the MULTILIB option OFF prior to building the net/kea or other port. For some reason, turning off multilib and building everything in one pass didn't work for me; lang/gcc needed to be done first and separately. Note that the multilib option is on by default, hence the problem.

At this point, we should probably admit that this is a problem with lang/gcc (and also lang/gcc49), not net/kea or the other two ports that brought us individually to this bug report. Mathieu has opened 209963 to specifically address that, and Aaron's error listings are valuable for that report as well.
